charts.name: Claims Portal Request Duration
charts.programText: A = data('service.request.duration.ns', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}')).percentile(pct=95, by=['sf_service']).publish(label='P95 Duration')

charts.name: Claims Knowledge Cache Filesystem Utilization
charts.programText: A = data('{{cache_utilization_metric}}', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.name', 'claims-knowledge') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('mountpoint', '{{cache_mountpoint}}') and filter('demo.metric_source', '{{evidence_metric_source}}')).max(by=['service.name', 'service.instance.id', 'mountpoint']).publish(label='Claims Knowledge Cache Utilization')

charts.name: Request Duration by Service
charts.programText: A = data('service.request.duration.ns', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}')).percentile(pct=95, by=['sf_service']).publish(label='P95 Duration')

charts.name: APM Duration by Service
charts.programText: A = data('service.request.duration.ns', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}')).percentile(pct=95, by=['sf_service']).publish(label='P95 Duration')

charts.name: APM Error Rate by Service
charts.programText:
A = data('service.request', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('sf_error', 'true')).count(by=['sf_service'])
B = data('service.request', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}')).count(by=['sf_service'])
C = (A / B).publish(label='Error Rate')

charts.name: Claims Knowledge Cache Filesystem Utilization
charts.programText: A = data('{{cache_utilization_metric}}', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.name', 'claims-knowledge') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('mountpoint', '{{cache_mountpoint}}') and filter('demo.metric_source', '{{evidence_metric_source}}')).max(by=['service.name', 'service.instance.id', 'mountpoint']).publish(label='Claims Knowledge Cache Utilization')

charts.name: Orchestrator Request Duration
charts.programText: A = data('service.request.duration.ns', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('sf_service', 'remediation-orchestrator')).percentile(pct=95).publish(label='P95 Duration')

charts.name: Remediation Agent Request Duration
charts.programText: A = data('service.request.duration.ns', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('sf_service', 'remediation-agent')).percentile(pct=95).publish(label='P95 Duration')
